role_description: General foreman responsible for multiple pipe fitting crews on industrial construction or refinery projects. Oversees all piping installation, prefabrication, welding, testing, and turnover activities in their assigned area. Coordinates with engineering on field changes, manages test pack completion, tracks overall piping progress, and reports to the superintendent.
report_focus: When structuring this person's reports, look for: overall piping progress by system or area, crew deployment and productivity, weld completion rates, NDE acceptance rates, test pack status, material procurement issues, engineering holds or RFIs, coordination with client and other disciplines, schedule recovery plans, safety performance, and look-ahead planning.
